what_it_measures: Extracted candidate facts that are correct and source-supported
required_inputs: synthetic protocol package; public template-derived text
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM only; RAG; TrialCompiler without human gate
notes: High precision is needed before asking experts to confirm facts.

what_it_measures: How many required design facts are found
required_inputs: synthetic protocol package; public template-derived text
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM only; RAG; TrialCompiler without fact dictionary
notes: Low recall causes hidden downstream inconsistency.

what_it_measures: Whether unconfirmed candidate facts are used in generated output
notes: Lower is better; should be zero for high-risk facts.

what_it_measures: Known conflicts detected across sections, tables and associated documents
required_inputs: synthetic document graph with injected inconsistencies
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM judge; deterministic grep; single-agent reviewer

what_it_measures: Reported conflicts that are true issues
required_inputs: synthetic document graph with injected inconsistencies
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM judge; deterministic grep; single-agent reviewer
notes: Controls false alarms and reviewer fatigue.

what_it_measures: Ability to detect old values after a fact change
required_inputs: fact change pair; updated and stale document units
baseline_models_or_systems: full-text search; LLM only; TrialCompiler graph version
notes: Example: Week 12 remnants after Week 16 change.

what_it_measures: How many impacted document units are identified for a fact change
required_inputs: fact change; document graph; document package
gold_label_source: gold impact matrix from synthetic dependency graph
baseline_models_or_systems: full-text search; no-graph RAG; LLM only
notes: Most important metric for change propagation.

what_it_measures: Whether unrelated text is unnecessarily changed
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM rewrite; RAG rewrite; TrialCompiler without minimal-edit constraint
notes: Lower is better; important for regulated document review.

what_it_measures: Proposed revisions accepted by reviewer without major rewrite
baseline_models_or_systems: LLM rewrite; single-agent repair; TrialCompiler multi-agent

what_it_measures: Whether repaired documents pass relevant tests after revision
notes: Shows value of D-agent independent quality gate.

what_it_measures: Whether all impacted tasks reach reviewed/closed status
notes: Reflects competitor-analysis insight: value extends from finding impact to closing tasks.

what_it_measures: Whether each output links to fact, source, rule, model, prompt and human decision
Wrong use of expired, draft, regional or out-of-scope rule
notes: Tests Clinical Semantic Element and metadata gates.

what_it_measures: Reused experience that is applicable to current project context
baseline_models_or_systems: plain memory; vector RAG; TrialCompiler governed memory
notes: Useful for proving memory is not just a chat log.

what_it_measures: Coverage of NMPA/CDE, Chinese templates, Chinese terminology and local workflow needs
notes: Competition-specific metric; needs future expert scoring.
